groups.title: Adobe Creative Cloud & Acrobat
groups.description: Adobe Creative Cloud for Teams & Enterprise, Adobe Acrobat for Business, Adobe Stock. Deployment, user provisioning, and workflow consulting for in-house creative, marketing, and media teams.

groups.description: Microsoft 365 Business / Enterprise, Microsoft Copilot, Windows Enterprise, Atlassian Jira & Confluence. License management, identity integration, and automated provisioning.

license.title: License management, end-to-end
license.subtitle: We don't just resell licenses — we operate them. From entitlement design and provisioning, through renewal, true-up reporting, and audit readiness.

tiles.title: Entitlement design
tiles.desc: Assess current state, classify users, and design an optimal license portfolio mapped to roles and workloads.

tiles.title: Deployment & provisioning
tiles.desc: Roll out through Azure AD / Google Workspace, configure single sign-on, automate provisioning via SCIM, and migrate data.

tiles.title: Renewal & optimization
tiles.desc: 60-day advance renewal alerts, usage analysis, right-sizing recommendations, and true-up reporting.

tiles.title: Managed support 24/7
tiles.desc: 15-minute response SLA, P1 resolution target within 4 hours, quarterly license health-check reporting.

sla.title: SLA commitments for enterprise customers
sla.subtitle: 15-minute response · P1 resolution within 4 hours · Quarterly license health-check reporting.

commitments.l: Licenses sourced through manufacturer-approved channels with full VAT invoicing
Response SLA across hotline, email, and chat during business hours
Vietnamese-speaking engineering team ready to handle incidents
Advisory on EA / CSP / Volume Licensing programs best matched to your needs

items.q: Through which channels does Digi43 source software?
items.a: We source through manufacturer-approved distribution channels in Vietnam and the region. Every license comes with valid documentation and full VAT invoicing. Specific vendor partner certificates can be shared under NDA upon request.

items.q: How do you handle deployment for 100+ users?
items.a: Standard deployment includes Azure AD / Google Workspace integration, single sign-on configuration, automated user provisioning via SCIM, and named-user reporting. Larger rollouts include dedicated project management.
15-minute response via hotline and email during business hours; P1 resolution target within 4 hours; quarterly license health-check reporting for enterprise customers.
Yes. Billing entity is in Vietnam (VAT-compliant invoicing), with service delivery available in English and Vietnamese. We coordinate with global procurement teams.
60-day advance renewal notice paired with usage analysis and right-sizing recommendations, true-up reporting for over-deployment, and consolidated POs for multi-product renewals.

items.q: Can you migrate licenses from another reseller?
items.a: Yes. License transfer, entitlement reconciliation, and user re-provisioning are part of our onboarding playbook.

about.title: An enterprise software solutions partner built in Vietnam
about.lead: Digi43 was founded in 2025 on a simple belief: Vietnamese organizations deserve access to the world's leading enterprise software platforms — delivered with the same standard of deployment and service expected in mature markets.

story.title: Our story
paragraphs: Founded in 2025 in Da Nang, Digi43 was born from the founding team's hands-on experience in the Creative and IT industries — witnessing Vietnamese businesses purchase software through informal channels, exposed to audit risk and unable to access serious technical support when it mattered.

We built Digi43 to close that gap: a technology partner that speaks Vietnamese, operates to international standards, sources licenses through manufacturer-approved channels, and stays alongside customers from the first advisory conversation through year-five renewals.

Our philosophy: a license is just the starting point. The real value lies in software that is deployed correctly, users that are provisioned cleanly, costs that are continuously optimized, and an organization that is always audit-ready.

items.title: Compliance-first
items.desc: Every license carries valid documentation. No grey market, no key cracking, no shared accounts.

items.title: Real service, not just a transaction
items.desc: Our work begins the moment the contract is signed. Provisioning, support, and renewal are core services.

items.title: Respect for software partners
items.desc: We honour each vendor's distribution terms. We never misrepresent products or self-claim certifications we do not hold.

items.title: Built for Vietnamese businesses
items.desc: VAT invoicing, Vietnamese-language documentation and support — designed for how Vietnamese organizations actually operate.
